prompt: Write a brief incident-response runbook (under 250 words) with exactly these five section headers, in this order: DETECT, TRIAGE, MITIGATE, RESOLVE, POSTMORTEM. The TRIAGE section must mention 'severity'; the MITIGATE section must mention 'rollback'; the POSTMORTEM section must mention 'action items'.
notes: Structured generation under multiple simultaneous constraints; medium rung - measures constraint retention across a long output.
